summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of VenuLock landing page redesign. All 29 tests passed. Hero section, search card, all dropdowns, sections (Trust Badges, Venue Categories, Featured Venues, How It Works, Why Choose Us, Stats, Browse by City, Testimonials, Final CTA, Footer) and navigation all working. Mobile responsive design verified - mobile header, hamburger menu, and stacked layout functioning correctly.

landing_page_load.details: Landing page loads without errors on desktop (1920x1080) and mobile (390x844)

hero_section.details: Dark luxury hero with cinematic venue background. Correct headline 'We Negotiate. You Celebrate.' with golden accent

search_card_tabs.details: City / Use My Location tabs render correctly with proper styling

city_dropdown.details: Opens and shows 12 cities (South Delhi, Mumbai, Delhi, etc.)

event_type_dropdown.details: Opens and shows 8 event types (Wedding, Birthday/Anniversary, Corporate Event, etc.)

guest_count_dropdown.details: Opens and shows 6 guest count options (Under 50, 50-100, etc.)

find_my_venue_btn.details: Navigates to /venues/search with correct query params (city, event_type)

advanced_filters.details: Toggle shows/hides budget and setting dropdowns correctly

trust_badges.details: 4 trust badges visible (Verified Venues, Transparent Pricing, Smart Comparison, Booking Assistance)

venue_categories.details: 4 categories visible (Hotels, Banquet Halls, Farmhouses, Resorts) with clickable buttons

featured_venues.details: 4 venue cards displayed with images, names, prices, amenities. View Details button navigates to venue detail page

why_choose_us.details: 3 cards visible (Curated Matches, Transparent Comparison, Expert Booking Support)

stats_section.details: Dark section with animated counters (500+ Verified Venues, 150+ Expert Planners, 4.8 Average Rating, 1800+ Events Booked)

browse_by_city.details: 9 city cards showing venue counts (Delhi 11 venues, Gurgaon 6 venues, etc.)

testimonials.details: 3 testimonial cards with names, events, cities, and 5-star ratings

final_cta.details: Dark CTA banner with 'Start Booking' button visible

footer.details: Dark premium footer with VenuLock logo, Platform links, Company links, Top Cities, Privacy Policy and Terms of Service

desktop_header.details: VenuLock logo, nav links (Discover Venues, Weddings, Corporate, List Venue), Sign In, Get Started button

mobile_header.details: Sign In button and hamburger menu visible. Menu opens with Browse Venues, List Your Venue, Get Started options

mobile_responsive.details: All sections stack properly on mobile. Desktop header hidden, mobile header visible. Search card and all dropdowns work on mobile

venue_card_navigation.details: View Details button navigates to SEO-friendly URL (e.g., /venues/mumbai/taj-mahal-palace-mumbai)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Landing page redesign fully tested and working. All 21 features in requirements verified: hero section, search card with tabs, dropdowns (city, event type, guest count), advanced filters, trust badges, venue categories, featured venues grid, how it works, why choose us, stats section, browse by city, testimonials, final CTA, footer, desktop header, mobile header, and responsive design. APIs used: /api/venues/featured (returns 4 venues), /api/venues/cities (returns city list with venue counts). The ConnectButton component is imported for the CTA section. All data-testid attributes are in place for future testing.
